_comment: All values support Python str.format(**kwargs) substitution. Override any key in your workspace's hook_messages.json.
tool_truncated: [Truncated: showing {shown_lines}/{total_lines} lines, {shown_chars}/{total_chars} chars. Use read_lines(path, offset, limit) for specific sections.]
emergency_recovery: [Emergency Recovery] {removed_count} messages were removed due to context limit. The conversation was about: {topic}
todo_rejected:
[Task {cur_idx}/{total} REJECTED] {rejection_reason}
Fix the issue, then call: todo_update(index={cur_idx}, status='in_progress')
todo_review:
[Task {cur_idx}/{total} REVIEW REQUIRED] "{content}"
You marked this task completed. Now perform a CRITICAL review before approving.
→ Pass → todo_update(index={cur_idx}, status='approved', reason='<concrete evidence>')
→ Issue → todo_update(index={cur_idx}, status='rejected', reason='<exact problem>')
todo_loop_continue:
[Task {cur_idx}/{total} LOOP {loop_count}/{max_loop}] "{content}"
Previous attempt did not satisfy exit condition: "{exit_condition}"
Try again. When done call: todo_update(index={cur_idx}, status='completed', tool_output='<full output>')
todo_loop_max_reached: [Task {cur_idx}/{total} LOOP LIMIT] {loop_count} attempts reached the maximum. Marking as approved automatically.
compression_system: You are a helpful assistant that summarizes conversation history for an AI agent.
compression_chunk_fallback: Summarize the following conversation segment concisely. Focus on completed tasks, key decisions, and current state.
